title: Moonshot plans to list in Hong Kong within six months at a $30 billion valuation
summary: Moonshot AI is preparing a Hong Kong IPO within six months at $30B+. Moonshot is dismantling its offshore VIE structure, a prerequisite for a smoother Hong Kong listing under the CSRC’s revised rules.
